headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Question
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: Fair Isaac: This Compounder Is On Sale
summary: FICO rated Buy as VantageScore fears fade; 10T price cuts and raised FY24 guidance support 57% upside to $1,856.
